issues.description: Effects array is empty. Card has clear triggered ability: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] Counter trigger when opponent activates Event, forcing opponent to bottom-deck 1 card from hand.
[Your Turn] in text requires duration: 'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn

effects.effect: When your opponent activates an Event, your opponent must place 1 card from their hand at the bottom of their deck.
